purpose: Map V3/V4 reviewed Chinese Level-1 card-flow categories to PRD 0427 visual card assets. This is UI configuration only; it does not change taxonomy or runtime issue data.
notes: Keep V3/V4 logical level1 names unchanged.
Use PRD 0427 card artwork through content/asset-map-0427.json asset keys.
Do not display internal Q ids in the UI.
PRD visual labels differ from the V3/V4 Chinese category names; this map bridges them.

items.notes: 对应 PRD career card；逻辑分类保持“职场与学业”。
V3/V4 的“关系与亲密”使用 PRD society card 视觉。
V3/V4 的“自我与情绪”使用 PRD emotion card 视觉。
V3/V4 的“生活节奏”使用 PRD city card 视觉。
V3/V4 的“欲望与金钱”使用 PRD desire card 视觉。
